organ_context: colonic mucosa with crypt-based architecture / gland-rich mucosa
organ context not clear / mixed field
overall_architecture: infiltrative irregular glands / back-to-back glands (invasion pattern)
solid nests/sheets of tumor cells (non-glandular dominant)
orderly benign architecture (preserved normal tissue pattern)
cytologic_atypia: marked atypia (high pleomorphism, prominent nucleoli, hyperchromasia)
mucin_features: intracellular or luminal mucin (e.g., goblet cells / luminal secretion)
squamous_differentiation: present (keratinization and/or intercellular bridges; possible keratin pearls)
benign squamous metaplasia / superficial squamous change (non-malignant)
